chapter_title: Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
text:
(a) A county may recover on the bond or letter of credit required for a permit issued under Section 623.011 (Permit for Excess Axle or Gross Weight) only by a suit against the permit holder and the issuer of the bond or letter of credit.

(b) Venue for a suit under this section is in district court in:

(1) the county in which the defendant resides;

(2) the county in which the defendant has its principal place of business in this state; or

(3) the county in which the damage occurred.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 623. Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
##### § 623.016 — Recovery on Permit Security

(a) A county may recover on the bond or letter of credit required for a permit issued under Section 623.011 (Permit for Excess Axle or Gross Weight) only by a suit against the permit holder and the issuer of the bond or letter of credit.

(b) Venue for a suit under this section is in district court in:

    (1) the county in which the defendant resides;

    (2) the county in which the defendant has its principal place of business in this state; or

    (3) the county in which the damage occurred.

*Acts 2021, 87th Leg., R.S., Ch. 410 (S.B.1814), Sec. 6, eff. September 1, 2021.*

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: Venue for a suit under this section is in district court in:
the county in which the defendant resides;
the county in which the defendant has its principal place of business in this state; or
the county in which the damage occurred.
